module.name: protocol
module.purpose: Owns the marix-protocol crate definitions and namespace exports for reusable session, task, plan, answer, step, execution, tool, and shared signature protocol contracts. TaskSignature derives ordering and hashing so ExecutionSignature and PlanSignature can key runtime maps, the plan module re-exports PlanEvent alongside Plan and PlanSignature, and the step re-export no longer includes the removed StepStatus.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task protocol contracts including task identifiers, events, request previews, signature-free TaskPreview request/result snapshots, TaskSignature values that derive ordering and hashing and implement Signature via their TaskId UUID, results, and statuses.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns Answer parsing, Plan parsing, run_steps/pending_steps planning fields, the PlanEvent Trigger notification, and task-carrying PlanSignature identity contracts for extracted model task outputs.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step protocol contracts including executable drafts, unit Intent step kinds whose descriptions live on StepDraft, StepSignature values, events whose StepEvent adds a Trigger variant, results, and previews; planning output moved to the plan module and the unused StepStatus enum was removed.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns execution protocol contracts including map-friendly ExecutionSignature values keyed by a task signature, execution ids, events, requests, updates that carry a 0-based seq, and statuses whose Succeed variant carries the expected update count.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns the SessionEvent protocol enum carrying task, step, execution, and plan events.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Owns tool schema and preview protocol contracts.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Local third-party re-export wiring for protocol internals.
